imagemap_desc: Waxay u oggolaanaysaa isticmaalka khariidado sawir oo la gujin karo dhinaca macmiilka iyadoo la adeegsanayo calaamadda <imagemap>
imagemap_no_image: Khalad: Waa in sawir lagu caddeeyaa safka koowaad.
imagemap_invalid_image: Khalad: Sawirku ma aha mid sax ah ama ma jiro.
imagemap_no_link: Khalad: Lama helin xiriir sax ah dhammaadka safka $1.
imagemap_invalid_title: Khalad: Cinwaan aan sax ahayn ayaa ku jira xiriirka safka $1.
imagemap_missing_coord: Khalad: Ma jiraan ku filan isku duwaha qaabka safka $1.
imagemap_unrecognised_shape: Khalad: Qaab aan la aqoonsan ayaa ku jira safka $1, saf kasta waa inuu ku bilaabmaa mid ka mid ah: default, rect, circle ama poly.
imagemap_invalid_coord: Khalad: Iskudubbar aan sax ahayn ayaa ku jira safka $1, waa inuu noqdaa tiro.
imagemap_invalid_desc: Khalad: Qeexidda desc ma aha mid sax ah, waa inay noqotaa mid ka mid ah: $1.
imagemap_poly_odd: Khalad: Waxaa laga helay poly leh tiro aan labboobnayn oo iskudubbarro ah safka $1
